title: marilaunidium undulatum
side_effects: Marilaunidium undulatum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, nausea, and stomach cramps in some individuals. Additionally, prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant may lead to liver damage and decreased kidney function. In rare cases, the plant's compounds can interact with certain medications, resulting in adverse reactions, such as increased blood pressure or irregular heartbeat. Furthermore, improper handling and preparation of the plant may also lead to allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory problems.
